hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */wailsjs/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not edit generated wailsjs bindings. Edit the Go backend and run wails generate module instead."}'; exit 0 ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */frontend/src/*.ts|*/frontend/src/*.tsx|*/frontend/src/*.css|*/frontend/src/*.json) cd /Volumes/git/luxury-yacht/app/frontend && npx prettier --write "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
